overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a snowy mountain settlement with log cabins, then entering and exploring a rustic cabin interior. The scene features pristine snow-covered landscapes with dramatic mountain backdrops.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain clearing with scattered pines and distant cabins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow toward a distant log cabin settlement

entered.detail: snow-covered wooden fence running along the right side of the path
tall evergreen trees heavy with snow on branches
large snow-capped rocky mountains forming the backdrop
rustic log cabin with snow-covered roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a pristine snow-covered field bordered by a wooden fence, approaching a rustic log cabin settlement. Snow-laden pine trees dot the landscape while massive snow-capped mountains rise in the background under clear winter skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy path between rustic log cabins

events.description: character slightly adjusts path to the right while approaching the target cabin

agents.ego_description: walking along a snowy trail past wooden cabins, approaching the main cabin entrance

entered.detail: large log cabin with decorative wooden crossbeams above the door, target destination
old wooden wagon wheel leaning against the cabin wall

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a snow-packed path between rustic log cabins, passing the first cabin on the left while approaching a larger cabin straight ahead. A wagon wheel leans against the right side of the target cabin as the character draws closer to the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned log cabin interior with broken furniture

events.description: character opens the wooden cabin door and steps inside from the bright exterior
interior reveals dim lighting with sunlight filtering through windows, creating high contrast with snow glare outside

agents.ego_description: opening the cabin door and stepping inside to explore the dark abandoned interior

entered.detail: rough-hewn log walls with green-painted window frames and weathered wood
collapsed wooden table with missing legs in the center of the room
empty wooden shelves mounted on the walls
windows with tattered yellow curtains letting in bright exterior light

segments.scene_description: The character enters the dark cabin interior, leaving the bright snow behind. Inside, the space is abandoned with broken furniture, empty shelves, and tattered curtains on windows that cast beams of light across the dusty wooden floor. The character looks around the dilapidated room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vast, frozen wilderness into the claustrophobic interior of a derelict home. It begins with a character walking through a pristine snow-covered field bordered by a wooden fence, with snow-laden pine trees and massive capped mountains looming under clear skies. As the character proceeds along a snow-packed path, the open landscape narrows into a settlement of rustic log cabins, passing one structure on the left before approaching a larger cabin with a wagon wheel leaning against its side. The scene then shifts abruptly from the bright winter light to a dark cabin interior as the character steps inside. Finally, the camera explores the dilapidated room, where beams of light pierce through tattered curtains to illuminate broken furniture and dusty wooden floors.
